data.body: Completion evidence (much of it is cross-repo/external — cf. bug 4636, the completion-verifier's out-of-tree blind spot): (1) AUTOMATION — .github/workflows/autobump.yml added to navapbc/homebrew-rebar (tap commit 9d1e594): scheduled (every 6h) + workflow_dispatch self-bump that polls PyPI and updates Formula/rebar.rb url+sha256 with the tap's own GITHUB_TOKEN, no stored cross-repo token. Verified idempotent no-op (tap run 29718513403) AND a real bump 0.9.0->0.9.1 (tap run 29720262710 -> tap commit 945f083, formula now nava_rebar-0.9.1.tar.gz). (2) DOCS — docs/releasing.md §3 rewritten to 'automated (scheduled self-bump)' with the manual recipe kept as a fallback (landed in Gerrit 859 / origin/main 0ea16f5f4). (3) RELEASE v0.9.1 — pyproject+server.json bumped 0.9.1 (lockstep, release_guards green); published to PyPI (0.9.1 present), MCP Registry, and GitHub Release; tag v0.9.1 = 0ea16f5f4. CHANGELOG [0.9.1] covers this + 858.
